scene.imageSummary: Roger stands large in the left foreground, holding his crossbow ready, looking across a vast, empty town square. Far in the distance on the right, Lukas stands tiny under a linden tree with a red apple balanced on his head, looking back at Roger.

setting.description: A vast, empty medieval town square with gray cobblestones, surrounded by timber-framed houses. A large linden tree stands in the far distance on the right. A silent crowd lines the very distant edges of the square, watching the scene unfold.
setting.camera: Ultra-wide shot, low angle looking across the square
setting.depthLayers: Roger large in left foreground, wide empty cobblestone plaza fills center, Lukas tiny right background under a linden tree

characters.name: Roger
characters.action: Holding crossbow ready, looking intently at Lukas

characters.name: Lukas
characters.position: far background right (tiny figure, 1/5 the size of foreground character)
characters.action: Standing perfectly still, looking intently at Roger

scene.translatedSummary: Roger steht gross im linken Vordergrund, hält seine Armbrust bereit und blickt über einen weiten, leeren Marktplatz. Weit entfernt rechts steht Lukas winzig unter einer Linde mit einem roten Apfel auf dem Kopf und blickt zu Roger zurück.
